rationale.root_cause: The response correctly identifies that std::vector::push_back may reallocate the storage, invalidating the iterator and causing a use-after-free when dereferenced.
rationale.local_fix: The proposed local fix captures the value before the loop, which does not satisfy the criterion of eliminating the dangling read by recomputing or reserving capacity.
rationale.global_fix: The response suggests storing an index instead of an iterator, which is a valid global fix to avoid storing iterators across mutating operations.
